config.script:
"""
	Written By: Sagar Iparkar
	Written Date: 25/07/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Update painting status 
	"""
	try:
	
	
	
		action = self.view.params.value
		rowData = self.view.params.rowData
		system.perspective.print("rowData "+str(rowData))
		system.perspective.print("action "+str(action))
		
		paintingId= rowData['Id']
		lineId = rowData['MST_Line_Id']
		workstationId =rowData['MST_WorkStation_Id']
		userId = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		M_BOM_Id = rowData['M_BOM_Id']
		Order_id = rowData['Order_id']
		areaId  = rowData['MST_Area_Id']
		M_BOMNumber = rowData['BOMNumber']
		serialNumber= rowData['SerialNumber']
		orderStatusId = 0
		shiftId = 1
		IsMaskingInProgress=0
		IsMaskingCompleted=0
		IsDemaskingInProgress=0
		IsDemaskingCompleted=0
		if int(action) == 1:
			eventId = 3
			message = 'Paiting Masking Started'
			orderStatusId = 6
			IsMaskingInProgress=1
			IsMaskingCompleted=0
			IsDemaskingInProgress=0
		else:
			eventId = 5
			message = 'Paiting Masking Completed'
			IsMaskingInProgress=0
			IsMaskingCompleted=1
			IsDemaskingInProgress=0
		
		shiftId=1

		params = {'AreaId':areaId,'LineId':lineId,'WorkStationId':workstationId,'CreatedBy':userId,'serialNumber':serialNumber,'bomId':M_BOM_Id,
		'PaintingId':paintingId,'MST_Event_Id':eventId,'MST_Status_Id':orderStatusId,'ShiftId':shiftId,'OrderId':Order_id,'M_BOMNumber':M_BOMNumber,
		'IsMaskingInProgress':IsMaskingInProgress,'IsMaskingCompleted':IsMaskingCompleted,'IsDemaskingInProgress':IsDemaskingInProgress,
		"IsDemaskingCompleted":IsDemaskingCompleted}	
		system.perspective.print("paramspainting masking" +str(params))
		
		result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/OperatorDashboard/Painting/usp_UpdatePaintingStatus",params)
		system.perspective.print("result painting masking" +str(result))
		if str(result) == '1':
			result=str(result)
			system.perspective.print("result " +str(result))
			state = "success"
#			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
			system.perspective.sendMessage("PaintingMaskingTableRefresh", scope = "page")
			system.perspective.sendMessage("PaintingDeMaskingTableRefresh", scope = "page")
			if IsMaskingInProgress==1:
				popup_id = 'MaskingImagePopup'
				params = {'AreaId': areaId,'MST_PaintingType_Id':1}
				view_path = 'Project_VECV/Templates/Operator Dashboard/Painting/Masking/MaskingImagePopup'
				system.perspective.openPopup(popup_id, view_path,overlayDismiss=False,  params=params,resizable=False, modal=True, draggable=False, header=False,showCloseIcon=False)				
			if IsMaskingInProgress <> 1:
				Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")

		else:
			message = 'failed'
			system.perspective.print("message " +str(result)+'  '+str(message))
			state = "warning"
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")        
		system.perspective.sendMessage("PaintingMaskingTableRefresh", scope = "page")
		system.perspective.sendMessage("PaintingDeMaskingTableRefresh", scope = "page")
#		system.perspective.sendMessage("OrderPunchingTableRefresh", scope = "session")
		project=system.util.getProjectName()
		messageHandler = "PaintingMaskingTableRefresh"
		system.util.sendMessage(project, messageHandler, scope="S")
		
		#End of try block		
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='StartButton'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Templates/Painting/Masking')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onAction  -> StartCompleteButton')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
		system.perspective.print("lineNumber description  " +str(lineNumber)+'  '+str(description))
